name: Chocolate Orange Supreme Cheesecake
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine crumbs, cinnamon and margarine; press onto bottom of 9-inch spring-form pan. Bake at 325 degrees F., for 10 minutes.
2. In a large bowl, combine cream cheese and sugar. Mix until well blended using an electric mixer on medium speed.
3. Add eggs one at a time, mixing well after each addition.
4. Blend in sour cream and vanilla extract.
5. Blend chocolate into the batter; blend liqueur and orange zest into remaining batter.
6. Pour chocolate batter over the crust.
7. Bake at 350 degrees F., for 30 minutes.
8. Reduce oven temperature to 325 degrees F. Spoon remaining batter over chocolate batter and continue baking for 30 more minutes.
9. Loosen cake from the rim of the pan; cool before removing the rim of the pan.
10. Chill.
